narrative:
Washington 4D (precinct in Fayette County) has 452 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points.
